title: Minecraft But You can craft Mobs Swords
description: This mods adds recipe for swords with mobs powers.
body:
This mod is only for Neoforge 1.21.1.
This mod adds custom swords with mobs powers. These swords are powerful and have abilities.
The recipes are given in the gallery.
But since most of you wont understand so i m giving recipe below:
**Wither Sword**: 2 coal blocks , 1 stick.
**Warden Sword**:2 sculk sensors(dont know its name) , 1 stick.
**Chicken Sword**:2 feathers , 1 stick.
**Skeleton Sword**: 2 bones , 1 stick.

  
**Warden Sword :**
Right-Click : Shoots sonic boom.

**Wither Sword :**
Right-Click : Shoots wither skull.

**Creeper Sword:**
Right-Click : Explode like a creeper.

**Chicken Sword:**
Right-Click : Get launched into air.

**Skeleton Sword:**
Right-Click : Shoot arrows.

**Endermen Sword:**
Right-Click : Throw an ender pearl.

NOTE:If you dont like this mod dont show hate because i m a Beginner.
